name: 13_missing_allocation_key
description: Qualifying holding with NO 'allocation' key -> producer uses h.get('allocation', 0.0); behaves identically to allocation=0.0.
derivation: AAPL: no 'allocation' key -> h.get('allocation', 0.0) returns 0.0; alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.0*0.10 = 0.0; weight += 0.0. SPY: alloc=0.5; alloc*(p-v)/v = 0.5*(95-100)/100 = 0.5*(-0.05) = -0.025; weight += 0.5. Sum diff: 0.0 + (-0.025) = -0.025. Sum weight: 0.0 + 0.5 = 0.5. Final: (-0.025, 0.5). Pins the .get('allocation', 0.0) fallback exactly.
